news.t: Emerging Markets ETFs Consolidate Near Crucial Support

holdings.infoBox: FEM is an equity ETF with a total of 170 individual holdings. The top holdings are Kinsus Interconnect Technology stock at 2.01%, Innolux at 1.68%, Unimicron Technology at 1.65%, Accton Technology at 1.59%, and Elite Material at 1.53%.

overview.description: The First Trust Emerging Markets AlphaDEX Fund (FEM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ AlphaDEX EM index. The fund tracks an index of emerging markets companies selected using a quantitative methodology and weighted in tiers. FEM was launched on Apr 18, 2011 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: Emerging Markets ETFs Consolidate Near Crucial Support
data.text: Ongoing U.S.-China trade tensions saw investors flee emerging markets stocks in May.

data.title: Why to invest in ETFs
data.text: Luken Investment Analytics CEO Greg Luken on how Trump's trade tariffs and tweets have impacted the market and why to invest in ETFs.
